title: Puerto Banus Yacht Rental for Hen Do: 2026 Guide
html:
Planning a hen do in Puerto Banus? Renting a private yacht from the glamorous marina lets your group celebrate in style on the Mediterranean. Prices typically start from €2,500 for a full-day crewed charter, and BoatHire24 connects you with verified owners offering exactly what you need.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

Most charters depart from the main Puerto Banus marina, a short walk from the designer boutiques and tapas bars. For a longer voyage, the nearby port of Marbella is a popular alternative. The sheltered bay of Cabopino offers a quieter launch point, while Estepona marina to the west provides access to the Costa del Sol. The iconic La Concha mountain forms a stunning backdrop as you cruise along the coast. You can browse boats for your dates in a few minutes.

How much does it cost to rent a boat for a hen do in Puerto Banus?

A crewed motor yacht for a full-day hen party typically costs between €2,500 and €5,000 in 2026, depending on size and season. Prices vary with boat specifications, included services, and peak demand. To compare options, you can browse boats for your dates on BoatHire24. One option worth a look is the Princess F70 for hire.

  • Shared sunset tour: from €80 per person
  • Small motorboat half-day: from €800
  • Catamaran full-day: from €2,000
  • Crewed luxury yacht full-day: from €2,500

Which boat to rent for a hen do

  1. Motor yacht (e.g., Princess, Sunseeker), Best for a glamorous, fast cruise with space for up to 12 guests. The Princess F70 for hire offers a flybridge, sun pads, and a full crew for a luxury day out, from €3,500.
  2. Catamaran (e.g., Lagoon 46), Stable and spacious, ideal for groups who want to lounge and party on deck. Holds up to 14 guests, from €2,500.
  3. RIB (e.g., Axopar 37), Great for an adrenaline-fuelled half-day, zipping to Marbella or Cabopino. 8 guests, from €800.
  4. Classic sailing yacht (e.g., Sun Odyssey 440), For a more relaxed vibe with sailing fun. Up to 10 guests, from €1,500.

When is the best season for a hen do boat trip in Puerto Banus?

For the best weather and calm seas, book your hen do between May and September. The local Poniente wind usually drops by late morning, leaving the afternoon perfect for cruising along the Marbella coast.

High season runs from June to August, when demand and prices are highest. May and September offer warm, settled conditions at slightly lower rates. The booking FAQ explains deposit and cancellation policies in detail. You can also see more at check availability.

Do you need a boat licence to rent a yacht in Puerto Banus?

No, a licence is not required when you charter a crewed yacht; the professional skipper handles all navigation. For bareboat hire (self-drive) you typically need a relevant ICC or equivalent, but most hen do charters include a captain and hostess. The operator will confirm exact requirements at the time of booking. To see how booking works, visit the booking FAQ.

At a glance

  • Price band: €800, €5,000 per day
  • Peak months: June, July, August
  • Trip length: half-day to full-day
  • Capacity: 8, 14 guests
  • Currency: EUR
  • Departure: Puerto Banus marina

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

Can we bring our own food and drinks on board?

Most charter boats allow you to bring your own catering, and many offer a selection of catering packages upon request.

What happens if the weather is bad?

Operators typically offer a full refund or a re-booking on another day if the captain deems conditions unsafe for sailing.

How far in advance should we book a hen do yacht?

For peak summer weekends in Puerto Banus, booking at least four weeks ahead is wise to secure your preferred boat and date.

Is there a minimum age limit for guests?

Most charters welcome guests of all ages, but some boats may have age restrictions for safety; always check with the operator beforehand.

To reserve your perfect hen do vessel, check availability on BoatHire24, where you can compare boats, read verified reviews, and book securely. Boat owners in Puerto Banus can also list their yacht to reach thousands of party groups worldwide.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
